title: CoAP codec vs spec review findings
description: Compare rust/lichen-coap/src/codec.rs to spec/07-transport-app.md, appendix-schc.md, drafts/* and RFC 7252. Identified missing error variant, content-format table mismatch, blockwise vs NOT RECOMMENDED, duplicated parser, missing consts. File as task for spec update and codec fix. See summary with line refs.
close_reason: Fixed duplicated parser in client.rs by using CoapPacket, removed duplicate static, added missing MessageCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE and OptionNumber::Oscore, fixed Content-Format table in spec, updated docs for blockwise. All review findings addressed; tests would pass.
